name: Moroccan Fish with Cumin
recipeInstructions: Adapted from "Ann Clark's Fabulous Fish". Pound the garlic with the salt and spices in a mortar. Add the cilantro and lemon juice and stir until the mixture is well-blended. Cover the pieces of fish with the marinade and let stand for about an hour. Bake the fish, uncovered, in a 400-degree oven for about 10 minutes per 1-inch of thickness, or until the fish flakes.
